title: Autonomous Vehicle Simulation
description: Built an end-to-end autonomous driving pipeline trained on 8,000+ Cityscapes and CARLA simulation images using PyTorch-based deep learning workflows. Implemented behavioral cloning with CNN-based steering prediction systems, reducing navigation error rates and improving simulated driving stability.

title: InstaResume — AI Resume Platform
description: Engineered a real-time AI-powered resume builder using React Hook Form with optimized state synchronization and live-preview rendering systems. Integrated Google Gemini AI to generate ATS-optimized resume content and implemented client-side PDF export workflows using @react-pdf/renderer.

title: BlogSpace Publishing Platform
description: Architected modular REST APIs using MVC patterns with scalable routing, middleware orchestration, and PostgreSQL-backed relational data modeling. Implemented JWT-based authentication and authorization systems securing protected CRUD workflows and session-aware user operations.
